Citation

Source: DESCRIPTION

Hanson JO, Schuster R, Morrell N, Strimas-Mackey M, Buenafe KV, Watts ME, Arcese P, Bennett JR, Possingham HP (2026). prioritizrdata: Conservation Planning Datasets. R package version 0.3.3, https://prioritizr.github.io/prioritizrdata/.

On this page
